config.name: streetcar
config.title: OC Streetcar (SARTC → Harbor/Westminster)
config.anchor_note: MEASURED but WEAK -- read spec 05 §3.3 before quoting. Composite of partial overlaps, not a co-located pair: parallel carriers Rt 60 (shape-share 0.29), 64 (0.35), 560 (0.56), 150 (0.41) x FY2019 weekday boardings (route_boardings.csv / 318) = ~5,034 raw corridor boardings, x uniformity 0.80-1.10 (boardings not uniform along routes) x FY2019->present trend 0.90-0.99 (anchor_from_apc.py). scripts/anchor_streetcar.py reproduces. NOT included: SARTC Metrolink/Amtrak transfers (no OCTA GTFS; partially via tau), greenfield PE-ROW new access (out of scope by construction -- upside risk). Crossing routes (43/543/53/47/57/83...) enter via the transfer market.

anchor_derivation.note: spec 08 A2b: the along-route uniformity band and the FY2019->present trend, promoted from anchor_note prose to structured keys (assumptions registry entry streetcar_anchor_derivation). The ~5,034 raw corridor boardings and the per-carrier shape-shares (0.29/0.35/0.56/0.41) stay in the prose -- they are measured shape overlaps (data), not a clean band. anchor_low/high (3600/5500) cross-check against 5034 x uniformity x trend within rounding-to-50 (3600~=5034x0.80x0.90=3624; 5500~=5034x1.10x0.99=5482).

local.note: composite of parallel carriers; contribution-weighted headway ~18 min (64 at 12/15, 60/560 at 20, 150 at 39); local speed per OCTA GTFS typical

service_new.note: 4.15 mi / ~22 min end-to-end (~11 mph), ~10 stops, 10/15-min headway per OCTA project docs

visitor.note: downtown Santa Ana civic-center/courts/event visitors; short trips; judgment call

cross_check.note: OCTA official projection ~6,000-7,300/day; CEO more recently ~5,000 (spec 05 §3.6)

config.asc_note: rail-ASC bracket BORROWED from the metro scenario (spec 05 §3.4); an at-grade slow streetcar premium may differ -- flagged, README issue 14

bca.note: No existing OCTA route is folded: the OC Streetcar is a new PE-ROW alignment, and services_base 'local' is a synthetic composite of the parallel carriers Rt 60/64/560/150 (spec 05 §3.3), which keep running -- there is no single route to remove. rev_hours_weekday is therefore omitted; avoided base O&M (spec 06 E4) is zero for both fold and retain. Crossing routes enter via the transfer market, not as removals.
